metadata.title: Wave 29 — Offshore Entity Verification for Argentine Monopoly Families
metadata.description: ICIJ database cross-verification of 25 active/in-penalty offshore entities linked to Argentine monopoly families. Each entity verified against media reports, judicial investigations, and current status.
metadata.methodology: Web search verification against Argentine media (Infobae, La Nacion, Pagina12, elDiarioAR), ICIJ Offshore Leaks Database, Argentine judicial records (fiscales.gob.ar, CIJ), and international investigative journalism sources.

roggio.monopoly_description: Construction monopolist, Buenos Aires subway (Metrovias), waste collection (Cliba). Cuadernos case arrepentido.

media_coverage.title: Aldo Roggio, arrepentido en la causa de los cuadernos, uso tres sociedades en el exterior para abrir cuentas en Suiza y EEUU
Pandora Papers: figuran sociedades y cuentas en Suiza y Estados Unidos de Aldo Roggio
El empresario Aldo Roggio formo junto a sus hijos sociedades offshore para canalizar inversiones en bancos de Suiza y Estados Unidos

entities.purpose: Bank accounts opened at JPMorgan in Zurich, New York, and Miami (March 2017). Financial investment vehicle.
entities.judicial_status: Roggio is arrepentido (cooperating witness) in Causa Cuadernos. Confessed to paying bribes to former Transport Secretary Ricardo Jaime (5% of subsidies). Oral trial began November 2025 before TOF 7. Offshore entities created 5 months after criminal complaint filed over Aysa Parana de las Palmas plant construction.
entities.risk_assessment: CRITICAL — Active BVI entity held by cooperating witness in Argentina's largest corruption case. Entity created during period of active criminal investigation. Bank accounts in Switzerland and US opened under entity. Alcogal classified Roggio as Level 6 (high risk) client.

entities.purpose: JPMorgan bank account opened. Part of three-entity structure for Swiss and US banking.
entities.judicial_status: Same as GOTLAND — Roggio is arrepentido in Causa Cuadernos. In Penalty status suggests BVI registry fee non-payment, not dissolution.
entities.risk_assessment: HIGH — In Penalty status but not dissolved. Entity part of coordinated offshore banking structure by corruption case cooperating witness.

entities.purpose: Blind trust administration for Roggio children. Part of three-entity BVI structure.
entities.judicial_status: Same as GOTLAND — linked to Causa Cuadernos arrepentido.
entities.risk_assessment: HIGH — Active BVI entity described as blind trust for children of corruption case cooperating witness. Potential asset-shielding vehicle.

blaquier.monopoly_description: Ledesma sugar monopoly (Jujuy). 125 government contracts. Carlos Pedro Blaquier died 2023 before trial for crimes against humanity (Apagon de Ledesma, 1976 dictatorship).

media_coverage.title: Panama Papers: los empresarios argentinos con cuentas offshore

entities.purpose: Panamanian shell corporation. Part of broader Blaquier family offshore network exposed in Panama Papers.
entities.judicial_status: No specific judicial proceeding identified against this entity. AFIP summoned ~1,500 Pandora Papers individuals for audit.
entities.risk_assessment: MEDIUM — Active Panamanian corporation linked to Blaquier family, which holds dominant sugar monopoly with 125 government contracts. Panama Papers exposure.

media_coverage.title: Carlos y Santiago Blaquier utilizaron firmas offshore para invertir en finanzas y empresas de pesca deportiva en el Caribe

entities.purpose: Financial investment vehicle for Carlos Herminio Blaquier. Shareholder is EDG Group Ltd (Marshall Islands trust company) — layered opacity structure. Blaquier identified as ultimate beneficial owner.
entities.judicial_status: AFIP audit initiated. No criminal proceeding identified specific to this entity. Family claims declaration to AFIP.
entities.risk_assessment: HIGH — Active BVI entity with Marshall Islands trust company as shareholder (double-layered secrecy). Financial investment vehicle for Ledesma shareholder with 125 government contracts.

entities.purpose: Trading entity. Part of Carlos Herminio Blaquier offshore portfolio.
entities.judicial_status: No specific proceeding. AFIP audit context from Pandora Papers.
entities.risk_assessment: MEDIUM — Active BVI trading entity linked to Ledesma sugar monopoly family.

entities.purpose: One of six BVI companies beneficially owned by Santiago Blaquier (2002-2016+). Part of Fishing Lodge Limited holding structure (Santiago owns 40%).
entities.judicial_status: No specific proceeding. Santiago Blaquier stated he declared entities to AFIP.
entities.risk_assessment: MEDIUM — Active since 2002 (24 years). Part of network of 6 BVI entities under single beneficial owner who is Ledesma director.

entities.purpose: Caribbean sport fishing / lodge operations. Part of Santiago Blaquier's 6-entity BVI holding structure.
entities.risk_assessment: LOW-MEDIUM — In Penalty (possibly inactive/abandoned). Sport fishing lodge entity.

entities.purpose: Fishing investment vehicle. Part of Santiago Blaquier's 6-entity BVI portfolio under Fishing Lodge Limited holding.
entities.risk_assessment: LOW-MEDIUM — Active fishing investment entity. Ostensibly recreational/business purpose.

coto.monopoly_description: Supermarket retail monopolist in Buenos Aires metropolitan area (AMBA). Alfredo Coto benefited from fiscal amnesty law.

media_coverage.title: Alfredo Coto figura en cinco sociedades offshore de Panama e Islas Virgenes Britanicas para realizar inversiones inmobiliarias en Miami

entities.purpose: Controlled by Coto since 2012, managed via Uruguayan office of Damiani firm. No associated bank accounts. Part of 5-entity offshore structure (3 additional BVI entities from 2017 via OMC Group for US real estate investment).
entities.judicial_status: Coto had separate judicial case: causa 3552/16 for illegal weapons/explosives stockpile found in Caballito supermarket (227 grenades, 27 firearms, 3886 munitions). Acquittal overturned by Casacion. Benefited from fiscal amnesty law for offshore asset whitening. AFIP demanded $642M pandemic solidarity contribution.
entities.risk_assessment: HIGH — Active Panamanian entity part of 5-entity offshore network. Owner benefited from fiscal amnesty. Separate criminal case for weapons stockpiling. Retail monopolist with significant regulatory capture.

de_narvaez.monopoly_description: Politician, former national deputy. Owner of El Cronista newspaper, minority shareholder America TV. 35+ companies. Legacy of Casa Tia retail chain.

media_coverage.title: A los De Narvaez les llueven denuncias e investigaciones por su riqueza

entities.purpose: BVI entity registered under Francisco De Narvaez Fecchino via Alcogal (Pandora Papers). Specific purpose not detailed in available sources.
entities.judicial_status: De Narvaez family under investigation for tax evasion: AFIP determined $88M pesos owed, criminal complaint for aggravated tax evasion filed. Cannot justify 900% asset increase over 5 years. $40M USD from Jersey trusts of unproven existence. UIF investigating sisters for money laundering.
entities.risk_assessment: CRITICAL — Active BVI entity held by individual under active investigation for aggravated tax evasion and unjustified 900% asset growth. Family members investigated by UIF for money laundering. Jersey trust funds of unproven existence.

media_coverage.title: Panama Papers: los empresarios argentinos con cuentas offshore

entities.purpose: BVI entity with Swiss bank account. Linked to Casa Tia operations. Three De Narvaez Steuer siblings as officers. De Narvaez claimed companies were 'declared at the time, as was appropriate'.
entities.judicial_status: Part of Panama Papers revelations. Maria Isabel and Juanita De Narvaez Steuer investigated by UIF for money laundering alongside Francisco. AFIP criminal complaint for aggravated tax evasion.
entities.risk_assessment: HIGH — Active since 1998 (28 years). Swiss bank account. Three family members as officers, two under UIF money laundering investigation. Panama Papers entity.

madanes_quintanilla.monopoly_description: Aluar aluminium monopoly (sole primary producer in Argentina, HHI 10,000 = perfect monopoly). Also owns Fate tires. Fortune valued at US$590M (Forbes #18 Argentina).

media_coverage.title: El dueno de Aluar y Fate recurrio a estructuras offshore para invertir en propiedades en Estados Unidos y organizar su herencia

entities.purpose: Shares held by Sarmul SA (Uruguayan company) but Madanes Quintanilla identified as ultimate beneficial owner in Alcogal spreadsheet. Co-director until at least 2018. Connected to Angerona Group Administration Limited (BVI, managed from Montevideo). Also created MQ One Limited (March 2016) for US$3M real estate investment in US.
entities.judicial_status: No specific criminal proceeding against this entity. Madanes Quintanilla currently in dispute with Milei government over aluminium import tariffs. No offshore-related criminal investigation found.
entities.risk_assessment: HIGH — Active BVI entity with layered ownership (Uruguayan holding company as nominal shareholder). Sole aluminium producer in Argentina (perfect monopoly). Beneficial ownership obscured through multi-jurisdictional structure. Heritage planning vehicle.

eurnekian.monopoly_description: Airport monopoly via Corporacion America / Aeropuertos Argentina 2000. 35+ companies. Eduardo Eurnekian (patriarch) involved in Cuadernos case.

media_coverage.title: Nueve de las diez familias mas ricas de la Argentina figuran en los Pandora Papers

entities.purpose: Holding company — shareholder of a shopping center in Uruguay. Martin Eurnekian's participation described as 'minority and personal'. Attorney-in-fact: Carlos Lecueder (Uruguayan businessman). Martin Eurnekian is tax resident of Uruguay since 2004.
entities.judicial_status: Eduardo Eurnekian (patriarch): acquittal annulled in fraud case against State (Aeropuertos Argentina 2000 simulated contracts). Also linked to Cuadernos case (properties raided). Eduardo transferred $715M ARS to trusts in Cayman Islands and Bahamas. Martin Eurnekian also linked to Mayville Capital Corporation (Panama, 2005) via Corporacion America directors and Southern Cone Foundation (Liechtenstein).
entities.risk_assessment: HIGH — In Penalty status but part of broader Eurnekian offshore network spanning BVI, Panama, Cayman Islands, Bahamas, and Liechtenstein. Family patriarch under active prosecution. Airport monopoly with state fraud allegations.

nardelli.monopoly_description: Vicentin grain company. USD 1.5 billion default (2019). CEO Sergio Nardelli died during investigation. Maximiliano is Sergio's son.

media_coverage.title: Denuncia contra Vicentin por lavado de activos — revelan mas sociedades offshore vinculadas a sus directores
La busqueda del tesoro escondido de Vicentin — complejo entramado de sociedades offshore
Vicentin y las cascaras vacias: un laberinto donde nada es lo que parece
Vicentin: deuda por $100.000 millones, el Estado Nacional primer acreedor, y la empresa offshore de los Panama Papers

entities.purpose: BVI entity with offices in Montevideo. Registered at same address as Vicentin: Santos Palacios 228, San Lorenzo, Santa Fe. Co-created with Habib Abraham. Connected to Nardelli family companies (Labutte SRL, Cia General de Combustibles SRL).
entities.judicial_status: ACTIVE CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION — Federal Court of Reconquista requested UIF information on Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) for Kerdale. Creditors filed criminal complaint at Procelac for money laundering. Investigations into triangulation operations, export underpricing, fund transfers between controlled firms and offshores in Paraguay, Uruguay, Panama. Criminal actions filed in Asuncion against Vicentin Paraguay (Criminal Court 3). Federal investigation of CEO, Padoan, former Banco Nacion president Gonzalez Fraga, former BCRA president Sandleris, and Macri for fraudulent cessation of payments.
entities.risk_assessment: CRITICAL — Active BVI entity at center of USD 1.5 billion default investigation. Same registered address as bankrupt parent company. Active money laundering criminal complaint. UIF SARs requested by federal court. Multi-jurisdictional investigation (Argentina, Paraguay). Entity used in suspected export underpricing triangulation.

acevedo.monopoly_description: CEO of Aceitera General Deheza (AGD), controls 40% of bottled oil market. Connected to Vicentin. Former UIA (industrial union) president. Married to Adriana Urquia (AGD heir).

media_coverage.title: Miguel Acevedo, el nuevo presidente de la UIA y sus empresas offshore
Quien es Miguel Acevedo, el nuevo titular de la Union Industrial Argentina?

entities.purpose: One of FIVE offshore companies owned by Acevedo and wife Adriana Urquia in Florida, USA. All created late 2013 during cepo cambiario (currency controls). Advisor Alvaro Castillo used Miami address to set up shell companies with concealed beneficial ownership.
entities.judicial_status: No specific criminal proceeding against Acevedo personally for offshore holdings. AGD investigated/fined for tax evasion with major cereal multinationals. Acevedo served as UIA president — regulatory capture risk.
entities.risk_assessment: HIGH — Active entity, one of 5 Florida shell companies created during currency controls (circumvention motive). Shell company structure with concealed ownership via Miami advisor. CEO of company controlling 40% of bottled oil market and former UIA president (revolving door).

werthein.monopoly_description: Insurance (former owners of La Caja), banking, agriculture (Cachamai brand). 30+ companies. 7th richest fortune in Argentina (US$1.9 billion).

media_coverage.title: Nueve de las diez familias mas ricas de la Argentina figuran en los Pandora Papers con sociedades y fideicomisos offshore

entities.purpose: Created November 1997 in BVI. Norma Gold de Werthein (mother of current Werthein businessmen) is final beneficiary. Origin of funds: 'inheritance'. Part of 4-entity Werthein family offshore network: also includes Ducal Investments Limited (BVI, 1998), Carnold Overseas Limited (BVI, 1998), and Chai 18 Limited (BVI, real estate on Fisher Island via Isaias Werthein).
entities.judicial_status: No specific criminal proceeding found against this entity or Norma Gold de Werthein. AFIP initiated ~1,500 audits of Pandora Papers individuals. Family declared $1.9B fortune.
entities.risk_assessment: MEDIUM — Active since 1997 (29 years). Oldest entity in this verification set. Inheritance vehicle for matriarch of $1.9B family fortune. Part of 4-entity BVI network. No criminal proceedings but AFIP audit exposure.

critical_entities: GOTLAND INTERNATIONAL LIMITED (Roggio — Cuadernos arrepentido, Alcogal Level 6 risk)
RETRATO PARTNERS LIMITED (De Narvaez — active tax evasion investigation, 900% unjustified asset growth)
KERDALE INVESTMENTS CORP (Nardelli/Vicentin — USD 1.5B default, active money laundering complaint, UIF SARs)
families_with_active_judicial_exposure: ROGGIO — Causa Cuadernos (oral trial Nov 2025, TOF 7)
DE NARVAEZ — Aggravated tax evasion, UIF money laundering investigation
NARDELLI/VICENTIN — Money laundering complaint (Procelac), fraudulent cessation of payments
EURNEKIAN — State fraud (acquittal annulled), Cuadernos case
key_patterns_identified: 9/9 families appear in Pandora Papers or Panama Papers
Alcogal (Panama) is registered agent for majority of BVI entities
Multiple families use Uruguayan intermediary structures (Sarmul SA, Damiani, OMC Group, Lecueder)
Entities frequently created during periods of legal exposure or currency controls
Layered opacity: BVI entity → Marshall Islands trust → Uruguayan holding → Argentine beneficial owner
AFIP summoned 1,500 individuals from Pandora Papers; ~100 formal audits initiated
3 entities (CRITICAL) are at center of active criminal investigations
Oldest entity (HINSLET OVERSEAS) active since 1997 — 29 years of continuous offshore presence

registered_agents.Alcogal: Majority of BVI entities (Roggio, Blaquier, De Narvaez, Madanes, Eurnekian, Werthein)

notes: 19 of 25 listed entities were independently verified through web search. The remaining 6 (additional Roggio family member connections to same 3 entities) are confirmed as the same entities with multiple officers.
All 9 families confirmed present in ICIJ Offshore Leaks Database.
In Penalty status in BVI means annual fees unpaid — entity not dissolved, potentially still usable.
Blaquier family stated all entities declared to AFIP. Roggio family committed to certifying 'proper information to Argentine tax authorities'.
Argentina ranked 3rd globally for offshore accounts in Pandora Papers leak.
